scopes.label: Vendor shortlist
scopes.content: Walrus for durable agent data, MemWal for agent memory, and Sui object proofs for receipt inspection.

scopes.label: Source-backed findings
scopes.content: The selected vendor must let a successor reopen scoped memory by object id and show redaction state without a hidden transcript.

scopes.label: Open questions
scopes.content: Confirm retention period, read latency, proof surface, and how a teammate can verify the successor did not inherit blocked notes.

scopes.label: Next comparison step
scopes.content: Ask the successor to produce a role-specific continuation from the durable will before expanding to a full workspace.

scopes.label: Pricing notes
scopes.content: Internal unit-cost guesses and renewal pressure notes from the private planning thread.

scopes.label: Private budget
scopes.content: Team budget ceiling and procurement timing are intentionally withheld from successors by default.

scopes.label: Unverified hunches
scopes.content: Speculative vendor preference without source support should not bias the successor.

scopes.content: Walrus for durable agent data, MemWal for agent memory, and Sui object proofs for receipt inspection.

scopes.label: Source-backed findings
scopes.content: The selected vendor must let a successor reopen scoped memory by object id and show redaction state without a hidden transcript.

scopes.label: Open questions
scopes.content: Confirm retention period, read latency, proof surface, and how a teammate can verify the successor did not inherit blocked notes.

scopes.label: Next comparison step
scopes.content: Ask the successor to produce a role-specific continuation from the durable will before expanding to a full workspace.

scopes.label: Pricing notes
scopes.content: Internal unit-cost guesses and renewal pressure notes from the private planning thread.

scopes.label: Private budget
scopes.content: Team budget ceiling and procurement timing are intentionally withheld from successors by default.

scopes.label: Unverified hunches
scopes.content: Speculative vendor preference without source support should not bias the successor.

sources.title: Walrus HTTP API
sources.finding: Publisher and aggregator endpoints can write and read blobs by id.

sources.title: Sui TypeScript SDK
sources.finding: SuiClient can inspect onchain object metadata for receipt proof.

sources.title: Sui Overflow 2026 Walrus track
sources.finding: The Special - Walrus track rewards agent workflows where Walrus is on the critical path.

checkpoint.nextStep: Choose a successor role, block restricted memory, and prove the restore path by receipt.
